name: Honey Chicken Muffins
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Prepare 12 muffin tins with cooking spray and flour. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, cornmeal, baking powder, mustard, baking soda, and salt. In another mixing bowl, combine chicken, buttermilk, applesauce, egg whites, and honey. Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients just until moistened. Use an ice cream scoop to fill muffin tins 3/4 full. Bake for 20 minutes.
